title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_log
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_log' MCP tool.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP roots.

absoluteGitRoots.description: Absolute paths to git repo roots; use for sibling clones under a non-git parent.

format.description: `markdown` (default): headed sections per root. `json`: groups array. `oneline`: `<sha7> <subject>` per line; lowest-token option for post-commit verification.

since.description: Passed to `--since=`. ISO timestamp or git relative form (`48.hours`, `2.weeks.ago`). Default: `7.days`.

paths.description: Limit to commits touching these paths (`-- <paths>`).

grep.description: Filter by commit message regex (git `--grep`, case-insensitive).

author.description: Filter by author name or email (`--author=`).

maxCommits.description: Max commits per root (hard cap 500, default 50).

branch.description: Ref/branch to log from. Default: HEAD.
